parameters.content:
## QA-02: Weekly Regression Suite

**Schedule:** Sunday 02:00 SAST (00:00 UTC)

Comprehensive tests:
- All landing pages + portal pages
- SSL certificate validation
- robots.txt & sitemap.xml
- AI-powered regression analysis

Full report emailed weekly.
